prompt: A hyper-realistic premium product advertisement featuring an oversized {argument name="footwear type" default="futuristic comfort clog"} placed on a smooth glossy reflective floor. A modern model dressed in {argument name="clothing colors" default="soft neutral-toned athleisure (off-white / beige)"} stands slightly leaning against the giant shoe with a relaxed, confident posture. Background: clean gradient blending soft sky blue into subtle lavender tones, with massive bold typography in the background reading “{argument name="headline" default="STEP INTO EASE"}” in a modern sans-serif font, stretched vertically and partially behind the subject. Lighting: high-end studio lighting with soft highlights, gentle reflections on the floor, and subtle rim light outlining the model and product for depth. Composition: editorial magazine layout, perfectly centered subject, strong negative space, luxury branding feel. Additional text (small, minimal placement at bottom): “Designed for all-day comfort. Made to move with you.” Style: ultra-clean, Apple-style minimalism meets fashion campaign, hyper-realistic, premium commercial photography, 8K, sharp details.
translatedPrompt: 一张超写实的优质产品广告，展示了一款巨大的 {argument name="footwear type" default="未来感舒适洞洞鞋"}，放置在光滑的亮面反射地板上。一位穿着 {argument name="clothing colors" default="柔和中性色运动休闲装（米白色 / 米色）"} 的现代模特，以放松且自信的姿态轻轻倚靠在巨型鞋履旁。背景：干净的渐变色，将柔和的天蓝色与微妙的薰衣草色融合在一起；背景中巨大的醒目排版文字写着 “{argument name="headline" default="STEP INTO EASE"}”，采用现代无衬线字体，垂直拉伸并部分置于主体后方。灯光：高端摄影棚灯光，带有柔和的高光，地板上有细腻的反射，微妙的轮廓光勾勒出模特和产品的边缘，增加深度。构图：杂志编辑排版，主体完美居中，强烈的留白，奢华的品牌质感。附加文字（底部小而简洁的排版）：“专为全天舒适而设计。随你而动。” 风格：极致简洁，Apple 风格的极简主义与时尚广告大片的结合，超写实，高端商业摄影，8K 分辨率，细节清晰。

breakdown.creativeCore: 未来感鞋履广告：一份详细的时尚鞋履产品广告提示词，包含高端摄影棚灯光和醒目的排版元素。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, rim light]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
